task: 1.2 - Enable Tempmemory Ingestion in Staging CI

behavior.auto: Enabled for non-main branches (staging), disabled for main (production)

changes.description: Updated feature flag default from 'false' to 'auto' with branch-based detection logic
Added same auto-detection logic to ensure consistency with pre-eval-ingestion

script_verified.description: Pre-evaluation tempmemory ingestion script for CI

emergency_rollback.method_1: Set CI_TEMPMEMORY_INGESTION_ENABLED=false at pipeline level in Woodpecker UI
emergency_rollback.method_2: Revert the .woodpecker/ci.yaml changes via git revert
emergency_rollback.method_3: Disable the entire pre-eval-ingestion step by commenting it out

partial_rollback.disable_specific_branch: Set CI_TEMPMEMORY_INGESTION_ENABLED=false in branch-specific environment variables
partial_rollback.enable_only_specific_branch: Override with CI_TEMPMEMORY_INGESTION_ENABLED=true for production if needed

verification_steps.expected: Should show 'auto' as default with branch detection logic

verification_steps.command: # Run via Woodpecker UI or wait for next PR build
verification_steps.expected: Pipeline runs pre-eval ingestion step on non-main branches

risk_1.description: Feature flag may not work correctly on first run
risk_1.mitigation: Monitor initial PR builds closely; rollback available via methods documented above

risk_2.description: Branch detection may fail if CI_COMMIT_BRANCH is not set
risk_2.mitigation: Falls back to 'false' (disabled) if detection fails - safe default

risk_3.description: Ingestion may fail if Redis/Qdrant unavailable
risk_3.mitigation: Script handles failures gracefully; CI pipeline continues (non-blocking)

next_steps: Monitor first few PR builds to verify feature flag works correctly
Validate ingestion results in staging before considering production enable
Update runbooks to include tempmemory ingestion monitoring
commit_message: feat(ci): enable tempmemory ingestion in staging (CLOSURE-SPRINT-001)
